pages.style_prompt: dark ambient orchestral with eerie strings and subtle percussion, tense and enigmatic
pages.reason: A nervous boy clutching an object stands beside a looming panda creature against a shadowed brick wall, creating an unsettling, mysterious atmosphere.

pages.style_prompt: dark eerie orchestral strings with subtle percussion, ominous and suspenseful supernatural atmosphere
pages.reason: Shadowy scene with a looming cursed monster mask and confident armed characters introduces a dark supernatural chapter, evoking mystery and dread.

pages.style_prompt: dark suspenseful orchestral strings, low tremolo, building unease and menacing tension
pages.reason: Confrontational dialogue with threats of violence ('I might just end up killing you') and an unsettling, menacing expression create a tense, hostile standoff.
